meaning: n.(=kef) 吸毒后的迷糊状态,麻醉品
examples: Ask kif you can get some money off the display model.
Ask kif client has a history of eye disease, trauma, or vision problems.
Ask kif client has a history of ear disease, trauma, or hearing problems.
Its 30.50mm diameter sports 27 jewels, a KIF anti-shock system, Glucydur balance and a Nivarox balance spring.
